programme.title: Riddiculous
programme.desc: Ranvir Singh hosts three teams who will go head-to-head over a series of Riddiculous riddles set by Riddlemaster Henry Lewis!

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Fantastic quiz show in which four players take on a machine in the hope of winning its £10,000 jackpot. Only one can win!

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: With thousands in cash at stake, four strangers must go head to head with a ruthless quiz genius who’s determined to send them home with nothing!

programme.title: Tenable
programme.desc: Gameshow hosted by Warwick Davis. Five contestants attempt to answer top 10 list questions for the chance to win a big cash prize. The more top ten lists, the greater the jackpot.

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Long-running soap following the ups and downs of village life amid the rolling scenery of the Yorkshire Dales.

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Long-running drama with the residents of England's most famous cobbled street.

programme.title: Help! We Bought A Village
programme.desc: Intrepid Brits restore empty and unloved settlements heading steadily for collapse, as they breathe new life into remote villages, hamlets, borgos and cortijos abroad.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal UK
programme.desc: Join host Stephen Mulhern for one of the most exciting and iconic gameshows of all time as one of his brave contestants takes on the infamous Banker for a life-changing cash prize.

programme.title: Te Karere
programme.desc: Te Karere brings you key events and stories of interest to Māori as well as bringing a Māori perspective to the day's news and current affairs.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal Australia
programme.desc: Join host Grant Denyer for a round of this high pressure and high stakes game show, where contestants face up to the Banker and must decide: is it deal or no deal?

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: It's game on as teams of complete strangers work together to win money and try and defeat the Chaser, a ruthless quiz genius, who wants to leave them with nothing! Hosted by Bradley Walsh.

programme.title: 1News At Six
programme.desc: The nation's leading team of journalists brings viewers the latest news and sport, plus the most comprehensive weather report.

programme.title: Seven Sharp
programme.desc: Join Hilary Barry, Jeremy Wells and the team for a fresh perspective on today's stories.

programme.title: The Repair Shop
programme.desc: Nestled deep in the British countryside, The Repair Shop is a place where battered, broken but beloved artefacts are brought back to life.

programme.title: Chateau DIY
programme.desc: In the Dordogne, Nick and Nicole begin major renovations on their château, while Erin and JB are desperately trying to complete the renovations of their turret art room.

programme.title: My Impossible House
programme.desc: Nik’s passion project is restoring a dilapidated 18th century military stone barrack cottage for his parents. It was once painted and used by Renoir and Victor Hugo and is precariously perched.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal Australia
programme.desc: Join host Grant Denyer for a round of this high pressure and high stakes game show, where contestants face up to the Banker and must decide: is it deal or no deal?

programme.title: Celebrity Race Across The World
programme.desc: The teams reach the halfway mark, and after 16 days traversing the length of Brazil, it’s time to cross the border and enter the heart of South America and three new countries.

programme.title: 800 Words
programme.desc: The summer people hit Weld with a vengeance when a jet-ski wipes out Woody and puts him into a coma.

programme.title: Te Karere
programme.desc: Te Karere brings you key events and stories of interest to Māori as well as bringing a Māori perspective to the day's news and current affairs.

programme.title: TVNZ1 Quiz
programme.desc: TVNZ 1 is a major New Zealand free-to-air television channel operated by the state-owned Television New Zealand. It broadcasts a broad mix of programming, primarily focusing on news, current affairs, drama, entertainment, and factual shows.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: TVNZ 1 is a major New Zealand free-to-air television channel operated by the state-owned Television New Zealand. It broadcasts a broad mix of programming, primarily focusing on news, current affairs, drama, entertainment, and factual shows.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: TVNZ 1 is a major New Zealand free-to-air television channel operated by the state-owned Television New Zealand. It broadcasts a broad mix of programming, primarily focusing on news, current affairs, drama, entertainment, and factual shows.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: TVNZ 1 is a major New Zealand free-to-air television channel operated by the state-owned Television New Zealand. It broadcasts a broad mix of programming, primarily focusing on news, current affairs, drama, entertainment, and factual shows.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: TVNZ 1 is a major New Zealand free-to-air television channel operated by the state-owned Television New Zealand. It broadcasts a broad mix of programming, primarily focusing on news, current affairs, drama, entertainment, and factual shows.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: TVNZ 1 is a major New Zealand free-to-air television channel operated by the state-owned Television New Zealand. It broadcasts a broad mix of programming, primarily focusing on news, current affairs, drama, entertainment, and factual shows.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: TVNZ 1 is a major New Zealand free-to-air television channel operated by the state-owned Television New Zealand. It broadcasts a broad mix of programming, primarily focusing on news, current affairs, drama, entertainment, and factual shows.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: TVNZ 1 is a major New Zealand free-to-air television channel operated by the state-owned Television New Zealand. It broadcasts a broad mix of programming, primarily focusing on news, current affairs, drama, entertainment, and factual shows.

programme.title: Te Karere
programme.desc: Te Karere brings you key events and stories of interest to Māori as well as bringing a Māori perspective to the day's news and current affairs.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: TVNZ 1 is a major New Zealand free-to-air television channel operated by the state-owned Television New Zealand. It broadcasts a broad mix of programming, primarily focusing on news, current affairs, drama, entertainment, and factual shows.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: TVNZ 1 is a major New Zealand free-to-air television channel operated by the state-owned Television New Zealand. It broadcasts a broad mix of programming, primarily focusing on news, current affairs, drama, entertainment, and factual shows.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: TVNZ 1 is a major New Zealand free-to-air television channel operated by the state-owned Television New Zealand. It broadcasts a broad mix of programming, primarily focusing on news, current affairs, drama, entertainment, and factual shows.

programme.title: Fishing And Adventure
programme.desc: It's an inshore adventure in the capital as Scott and Mig try to avoid the consequence as they look to hunt down the elusive Wellington harbour elephant fish.

programme.title: Rural Delivery
programme.desc: Meeting Ahuwhenua Young Māori Farmer of the Year 2022, Chloe Butcher-Herries; developing wool products for domestic and international markets; and upscaling sheepskins at a Wanaka furnishings store.

programme.title: Hyundai Country Calendar
programme.desc: On the shores of Lake Taupō a beekeeping whānau works together to carve out a unique market for raw organic honey, for both food and health products.

programme.title: Susan Calman's Great British Cities
programme.desc: Susan Calman unearths the historical stories of great conurbations such as Liverpool, Bath, Cambridge, Leeds, Newcastle and Glasgow, revealing their secret stories and the people behind their past.

programme.title: Find My Country House Canada
programme.desc: Couples looking to relocate from the city find their perfect country house in a regional, Canadian location.

programme.title: Cooking With The Stars
programme.desc: Emma Willis and Tom Allen host the fifth series semi-final as the remaining stars celebrate food that provides healthy and nutritious benefits and battle to reach the grand final.

programme.title: The Hardacres
programme.desc: Season Finale: The Hardacres set things right, but an unexpected bombshell lands.

programme.title: Johnny Vegas' Little Shop Of Antiques
programme.desc: Johnny and Bev hit an auction and return with a full van. One pricey toy disappoints, while ceramics expert Johnny snaps up a bundle of pottery.

programme.title: The Travelling Auctioneers
programme.desc: Research, restore and ready for sale! An intrepid team of antiques experts and master crafters help families turn unwanted items into winning lots.

programme.title: Tipping Point: Best Ever Finals
programme.desc: Look back at some of the most dramatic end games in Tipping History, including agonising trades and jackpot counters teetering on the edge.

programme.title: Lingo
programme.desc: Quiz show hosted by Adil Ray in which three pairs of contestants use their powers of deduction to work out words that appear in the Lingo grids and Puzzlewords.

programme.title: Irresistible: Why We Can't Stop Eating
programme.desc: Chris van Tulleken takes a personal view at why ultra-processed foods are so irresistible and how they have come to dominate food culture.

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: It's game on as teams of complete strangers work together to win money and try and defeat the Chaser, a ruthless quiz genius, who wants to leave them with nothing! Hosted by Bradley Walsh.

programme.title: 1News At Six
programme.desc: The nation's leading team of journalists brings viewers the latest news and sport, plus the most comprehensive weather report.

programme.title: The Dog House
programme.desc: It's double trouble for the Bodleys as cockapoo twins Milo and Mabel burst into the pen. Can canine and family energy levels match? And Floyd the stray lurcher needs a good feed.

programme.title: Lotto
programme.desc: TVNZ 1 is a major New Zealand free-to-air television channel operated by the state-owned Television New Zealand. It broadcasts a broad mix of programming, primarily focusing on news, current affairs, drama, entertainment, and factual shows.

programme.title: The Other Bennet Sister
programme.desc: Mary's London debut is derailed by a jealous rival and troubling news from home.

programme.title: Call The Midwife
programme.desc: The Nonnatus team help a young father come to terms with a life-threatening diagnosis, and Trixie uncovers a mystery illness in a female wrestler.

programme.title: Alison Hammond's Big Weekend
programme.desc: Season Finale: Alison Hammond spends a big weekend with boxing world champion Tony Bellew. He reveals how he’s coping with retirement and how boxing has taken a toll on his health.

programme.title: Leonard And Hungry Paul
programme.desc: Leonard gets positive feedback on his new children’s book proposal. Encouraged, he asks Shelley to go on another date, which doesn’t go to plan.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Olympia works to repair her relationship with her family after she takes on a case involving her mother's new husband; Matty and Olympia receive a shocking piece of information.

programme.title: Totally Completely Fine
programme.desc: After agreeing to take on her grandfather's post, an anxious Vivian calls on Dane to school her in the art of suicide prevention.

programme.title: Superyacht: How Safe is Your Voyage?
programme.desc: A minute-by-minute analysis of the tragedy involving the Bayesian, examining the potential factors involved in the sinking of the vessel off the coast of Sicily during a powerful storm in August.

programme.title: Chateau DIY
programme.desc: Stephanie is running out of time to build a gazebo for her mum’s birthday celebration. Janet and Philip face a plaster disaster as they struggle to get the salon renovated.

programme.title: TVNZ1 Quiz
programme.desc: TVNZ 1 is a major New Zealand free-to-air television channel operated by the state-owned Television New Zealand. It broadcasts a broad mix of programming, primarily focusing on news, current affairs, drama, entertainment, and factual shows.

programme.desc: TVNZ 1 is a major New Zealand free-to-air television channel operated by the state-owned Television New Zealand. It broadcasts a broad mix of programming, primarily focusing on news, current affairs, drama, entertainment, and factual shows.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: TVNZ 1 is a major New Zealand free-to-air television channel operated by the state-owned Television New Zealand. It broadcasts a broad mix of programming, primarily focusing on news, current affairs, drama, entertainment, and factual shows.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: TVNZ 1 is a major New Zealand free-to-air television channel operated by the state-owned Television New Zealand. It broadcasts a broad mix of programming, primarily focusing on news, current affairs, drama, entertainment, and factual shows.

programme.title: Rural Delivery
programme.desc: A community effort protects the endangered who (blue duck); Gisborne company LeaderBrand’s future farming project goes under cover; and LeaderBrand’s salad production capability gets an extra boost.

programme.title: SPCA Rescue
programme.desc: A dog with a mysterious injury needs urgent medical attention, a dumped rooster in Christchurch and a night time visit from SPCA staff to rescue a couple of dogs left home alone with nothing to eat.

programme.title: Roads Less Travelled
programme.desc: A 2 part Road Trip series uncovering all the hidden gems that can be found in New Zealand.
